title: PROGRAMME EPISODE detail page » PROGRAMME
user_story:
As a visitor
I want the PROGRAMME EPISODE detail page to show the connected PROGRAMME
So I can ...
description:
* The PROGRAMME EPISODE detail page is extended to contain a section for the connected PROGRAMME.
* The PROGRAMME is presented with its name and primary information.
* The PROGRAMME contains a link to its detail page.
* The PROGRAMME has a thumbnail image.
* When there is no PROGRAMME connected to the PROGRAMME EPISODE then the section is not displayed at all.
